case_title: SHIPING MA VS. CENIOUS BREWSTER et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BREWSTER, CENIOUS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MEDICAL REIMBURSEMENT LIEN FILED BY CLAIMANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JOHN JOSEPH MURRAY.
ARBITRATOR DAVID ROBERT VOGL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUN-13-2014 THROUGH SEP-11-2014.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUN-02-2014. MAR-26-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, SHIPING JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, SHIPING AS TO DEFENDANT BREWSTER, CENIOUS
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MA, SHIPING AS TO DEFENDANT BREWSTER, CENIOUS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUN-12-2014.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, SHIPING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BREWSTER, CENIOUS $68,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $68,000.00, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $570.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE MAR-16-2015,, (TRANSACTION ID # 15053136) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, SHIPING

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, SHIPING AS TO DEFENDANT BREWSTER, CENIOUS DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-26-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-23-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-03-2014
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BREWSTER, CENIOUS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, SHIPING SERVED NOV-04-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BREWSTER, CENIOUS
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR VOGL, DAVID ROBERT
